purpose: Illustrative delegation-evidence fixture binding a live human principal to a scoped AI agent. There is no ratified 'delegation evidence' predicate ID yet (see conformance/levels.md, CL-3 open gap) — field names here are illustrative pending that decision.

step_up_event.expected_result: requires fresh liveness + holder-binding proof bound to action_digest (see CT-UC010-POS-01)

negative_cases.agent_key_swap_after_issuance: reject — delegation is bound to the original agent_key, not renewable by substitution (see CT-UC009-NEG-01)
negative_cases.liveness_proof_alone_no_delegation_evide: insufficient — must not be treated as authorisation (see CT-UC009-NEG-02)

known_gaps: revocation propagation timing to already-authorised agents undefined
